# Trigonometric Ratios Definitions

## Short Teaching Summary
The basic trigonometric ratios for a right-angled triangle are: Sine (sin θ) = Opposite / Hypotenuse, Cosine (cos θ) = Adjacent / Hypotenuse, and Tangent (tan θ) = Opposite / Adjacent.
